prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2022–2025 年理科/物理类最低位次约 7575→18438→16551→12979，近三年波动较大，2023 年大幅后移后 2024–2025 年持续前移；2025 年基准约 12979 名；该校在四川理科/物理类计划 2022–2023 年均为 9 人，2024–2025 年缩至 8 人；2026 年计划仍为 8 人，与 2025 年持平，无扩缩变化。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 211、双一流；软科主榜 2026 年约第 79 名，较 2025 年（第 82 名）小幅上升，学校综合实力稳中有升；2026 年声誉评价偏负面，主要涉及考研名师田静学历造假关联事件及师德师风舆情，可能对报考心理产生一定抑制；抖音热度排名第 39（较热），短视频曝光量中等；2023 年曾出现小语种专业录取位次明显下降的投档异常信号；外国语言文学 A+（全国顶尖），与该校英语、法语、德语、西班牙语、翻译等招生专业高度对应，学科实力对语言类考生有较强吸引力。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 外语类专业 2024 年热度评估为「一般观望」，整体热度平稳偏冷；计算机/电子信息等工科专业社会热度较高，但该校理科招生专业以语言类为主，工科仅计算机科学与技 术（语言智能）一个方向；四川省 2026 年高考总报名约 53.5 万人，较 2025 年（约 46.3 万）明显增加，按近年科类比例估算物理类考生约 32.9 万人，竞争加剧；该校位于北京，非本省高校，无 local_enrollment_share 数据；四川考生对京校有较强地域偏好，但外语类院校在理科生中吸引力相对有限。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合 2025 年基准位次 12979、2026 年招生计划持平、四川省考生规模明显增加导致竞争加剧、学校声誉偏负面等因素，预计 2026 年理科最低录取位次较 2025 年小幅后移；预测最低位次约 13009 名，区间 12509–13509 名。

- 翻译（外交外事高级翻译）

major_tier_recommendation.tier_3:
三档（相对好进）

major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 位次在预测区间（12509–13509）内建议以二档为主、一档冲刺、三档保底；位次明显优于区间下限（<12509）可重点冲一档联合培养项目；位次接近区间上限（>13509）建议以 三档保底为主。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: 2022–2025 minimum rankings for Science/Physics Category approximately 7575→18438→16551→12979, with significant fluctuations in recent three years; after a large backward shift in 2023, it has been moving forward continuously in 2024–2025; the 2025 baseline is about 12979; the university's plan in Sichuan for Science/Physics Category was 9 students in 2022–2023, reduced to 8 students in 2024–2025; the 2026 plan remains 8 students, unchanged from 2025, with no expansion or reduction.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 211, Double First-Class; Soft Science main ranking in 2026 approximately 79th, slightly up from 2025 (82nd), indicating stable improvement in overall strength; reputation evaluation in 2026 is somewhat negative, mainly involving the fake academic credentials incident of postgraduate exam master Tian Jing and related teacher ethics public opinion, which may suppress application psychology to some extent; Douyin popularity ranking 39th (relatively hot), with moderate short video exposure; in 2023, there was an abnormal signal of significant decline in admission rankings for minor language majors; Foreign Language and Literature A+ (top nationally), highly corresponding to the university's English, French, German, Spanish, Translation and other enrollment majors, with strong academic appeal to language-oriented candidates.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Foreign language majors in 2024 popularity evaluation as 'generally wait-and-see', overall popularity stable and slightly cold; engineering majors like Computer/Electronic Information have high social popularity, but the university's science enrollment majors are mainly language-oriented, with only Computer Science and Technology (Language Intelligence) as an engineering direction; total Sichuan Gaokao registrations in 2026 approximately 535,000, significantly increased from 2025 (about 463,000), with estimated Physics Category candidates about 329,000 based on recent subject ratios, intensifying competition; the university is located in Beijing, not a local province university, with no local_enrollment_share data; Sichuan candidates have strong regional preference for Beijing universities, but foreign language institutions have relatively limited appeal among science students.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the 2025 baseline ranking of 12979, unchanged 2026 enrollment plan, significant increase in Sichuan candidate numbers leading to intensified competition, and somewhat negative university reputation, it is expected that the 2026 minimum admission ranking for Science will slightly shift backward compared to 2025; predicted minimum ranking approximately 13009, with a range of 12509–13509.

- Translation (Diplomatic and Foreign Affairs Advanced Translation)

Tier 3 (Relatively Easier to Enter)

- Spanish
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: If ranking is within the predicted range (12509–13509), it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 as main, Tier 1 as sprint, and Tier 3 as safety; if ranking is significantly better than the lower limit (<12509), focus on Tier 1 joint training programs; if ranking is close to the upper limit (>13509), it is recommended to mainly use Tier 3 as safety.

prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2022–2025 年文科/历史类最低位次约 873→5575→1476→1460，2023 年出现大幅后移（小语种专业遇冷），2024–2025 年显著前移并趋于稳定；2025 年基准约 1460 名；该校在四川文科/历史类计划 2022 年 11 人、2023 年 12 人、2024–2025 年均为 13 人；2026 年计划 11 人，较 2025 年缩招 2 人（-15.4%），缩招幅度较大，理论上使竞争略有缓解。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 211、双一流；软科主榜 2026 年约第 79 名，近年排名稳中有升，学校层次对文科考生有较强吸引力；2026 年声誉评价偏负面，涉及考研名师田静学历造假关联事件及师德师风舆情，可能对报考心理产生一定抑制；抖音热度排名第 39（较热），短视频曝光量中等；2023 年曾出现小语种专业录取位次明显下降的投档异常信号，但 2024–2025 年已回升；外国语言文学 A+（全国顶尖），与该校法语、英语、西班牙语、阿拉伯语、翻译等文科招生专业高度对应，学科实力对文科语言类考生有极强吸引力。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 外语类专业 2024 年热度评估为「一般观望」，整体热度平稳偏冷；法学、汉语言文学等文科专业社会热度分化或偏热，但该校文科招生以语言类为主；四川省 2026 年高考总报名约 53.5 万人，较 2025 年（约 46.3 万）明显增加，按近年科类比例估算历史类考生约 20.6 万人，竞争加剧；该校位于北京，非本省高校；四川文科考生对北京高校有较强地域偏好，外语类院校在文科生中吸引力较强。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合 2025 年基准位次 1460、2026 年计划缩招 15.4%（理论上使位次前移）、四川省考生规模明显增加（竞争加剧）、学校声誉偏负面等因素，缩招效应与考生增加效应基本对冲，预计 2026 年文科最低录取位次较 2025 年小幅前移；预测最低位次约 1340 名，区间 1099–1581 名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: 2022–2025 minimum rankings for Arts/History Category approximately 873→5575→1476→1460, with a significant backward shift in 2023 (minor language majors underperformed), followed by a notable forward shift and stabilization in 2024–2025; 2025 baseline approximately 1460th place; enrollment plan in Sichuan for Arts/History Category: 11 in 2022, 12 in 2023, 13 in both 2024 and 2025; 2026 plan 11, a reduction of 2 (-15.4%) compared to 2025, a relatively large reduction, theoretically easing competition slightly.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 211, Double First-Class; Soft Science main ranking approximately 79th in 2026, with stable or rising rankings in recent years; school level has strong appeal to Arts candidates; 2026 reputation evaluation is somewhat negative, involving the graduate entrance exam teacher Tian Jing's academic credential fraud incident and teacher ethics public opinion, which may suppress application psychology to some extent; Douyin popularity ranking 39th (relatively hot), short video exposure moderate; in 2023, there was an abnormal signal of significantly lower admission rankings for minor language majors, but it recovered in 2024–2025; Foreign Language and Literature A+ (top nationally), highly corresponding to the university's French, English, Spanish, Arabic, Translation and other Arts admission majors, with strong disciplinary appeal to Arts language candidates.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Foreign language majors' 2024 popularity assessment is 'generally wait-and-see', overall popularity stable and slightly cool; Law, Chinese Language and Literature and other Arts majors have differentiated or hot social popularity, but the university's Arts admission is mainly language-oriented; Sichuan Province 2026 total college entrance exam registrations approximately 535,000, a significant increase from 2025 (approximately 463,000), with estimated History Category candidates about 206,000 based on recent subject ratio, intensifying competition; the university is located in Beijing, not a provincial university; Sichuan Arts candidates have a strong regional preference for Beijing universities, and foreign language institutions have strong appeal among Arts candidates.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the 2025 baseline ranking of 1460, the 2026 enrollment plan reduction of 15.4% (theoretically moving ranking forward), the significant increase in Sichuan candidate numbers (intensifying competition), and the somewhat negative school reputation, the reduction effect and candidate increase effect largely offset each other; it is expected that the 2026 Arts minimum admission ranking will move slightly forward compared to 2025; predicted minimum ranking approximately 1340th, with a range of 1099–1581.
